title: lycopodiella trianae
intro: Lycopodiella trianae, also known as Triana's spike moss, is a species of small, perennial plant in the family Lycopodiaceae. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal compounds. The health benefits of Lycopodiella trianae include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Lycopodiella trianae is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used to treat various health conditions.
